scope: Implemented the Rust local broker HTTP server, config loading/reload, cancellation lifecycle, and minimal built-in addon registries for context, prompt, policy, and postprocessing. No editor UI, workspace indexing, remote broker, cloud auth, or real pi smoke test was implemented.

summary.provider_selection: BrokerConfig.provider.kind selects mock or pi inside the broker; clients continue to call the same /v1/autocomplete protocol.
summary.addon_pipeline: AddonRuntime trims request-supplied context, enforces privacy policy, selects code/markdown prompt templates, and builds the core postprocessor pipeline before provider responses reach clients. The core provider trait now supports ProviderRequestContext so the server-selected prompt system prompt is passed to providers; PiProvider uses it when rendering pi prompts.

implementation_notes: Added autocomplete-addons with AddonSettings, AddonRuntime, ContextProviderRegistry, NearbyTextWindow, PromptTemplateRegistry, code/markdown prompt templates, PostprocessorRegistry, and PolicyEngine using globset/url.

Added autocomplete-server with BrokerConfig TOML loading, defaults for trigger/context/privacy/provider settings, AppState, axum Router construction, in-flight cancellation token tracking, reload-from-config-path support, provider factory, and runnable CLI binary.

Autocomplete HTTP handler parses JSON, validates protocol requests, applies addon preparation before provider invocation, registers in-flight cancellation tokens, calls AutocompleteEngine, and returns protocol-compatible responses.
Cancel endpoint is best-effort and idempotent while in-flight; completed request_ids are tracked and return already_completed after completion.
Reload endpoint rebuilds runtime state from the config path when AppState was constructed from a file, otherwise returns unchanged.
Privacy policy rejects excluded file:// paths and over-budget remote context before provider invocation. Built-in context providers use only explicit request context and do not read files.
Health reports mock as available and pi as unknown without invoking pi. Real pi availability/latency remains deferred to runtime smoke work.
tests_added: crates/autocomplete-addons/tests/addon_runtime.rs covers context trimming, excluded path rejection, and code/markdown prompt selection.

crates/autocomplete-server/tests/config_loading.rs covers partial TOML config loading, provider selection, privacy override loading, trigger defaults, and disabled open-file/workspace-symbol defaults.

crates/autocomplete-server/tests/http_endpoints.rs covers /health, valid mock autocomplete with postprocessing, invalid autocomplete rejection, cancellation lifecycle, reload changing mock behavior without client changes, pi provider selection in health, excluded-path privacy rejection, remote context byte-limit rejection, and Obsidian-style Markdown requests.

commands_run.result: initial red failed on missing AddonRuntime/AddonSettings/PromptKind, then passed after autocomplete-addons implementation
initial red failed on missing app/AppState/BrokerConfig/ProviderKind, then passed after server implementation
passed after fixing TOML format loading and preserving request_id on addon policy errors
initially reported formatting diffs; cargo fmt --all was run

safety_notes: No autocomplete request path reads arbitrary files; the MVP context provider only trims prefix/suffix supplied in the request.
Excluded globs include **/.env*, **/secrets/**, and **/prompt-buffer.md by default and are enforced before provider invocation.
Pi provider remains isolated by prior fake-pi tests and now accepts broker-selected prompt context without changing client protocol.
No forbidden paths were read; archive/tmp/prompt-buffer.md were not opened. Existing unrelated worktree deletions and untracked orchestration/archive paths were preserved.
known_limits: Pi health does not spawn or validate the real pi executable; it reports provider status unknown until later runtime smoke work.
Reload errors return HTTP 500 with reload status unchanged rather than a richer typed reload error body because the protocol currently defines only ReloadResponse.
Completed request_id tracking is in-memory and unbounded in this MVP implementation.
queue_recommendation: Proceed to independent verification MVP-031. Runtime pi latency/model availability remains deferred to MVP-050.
